---
name: Feature Request / 功能请求
about: Suggest an idea for this project / 为此项目提出想法
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description / 功能描述

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.
清晰简洁地描述您希望看到的功能。

## Problem / 问题

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
您的功能请求是否与某个问题相关？请描述。

Example: I'm always frustrated when [...]
示例：我总是对 [...] 感到困扰

## Proposed Solution / 提议的解决方案

Describe the solution you'd like.
描述您想要的解决方案。

## Alternatives Considered / 考虑的替代方案

Describe alternatives you've considered.
描述您考虑过的替代方案。

## Use Case / 使用场景

Describe how this feature would be used and who would benefit.
描述此功能将如何使用以及谁将受益。

Example scenarios:
示例场景：

1. As a user, I want to...
2. When I'm..., I need to...

## Benefits / 好处

- List the benefits of this feature
- 列出此功能的好处

## Additional Context / 额外上下文

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
在此添加关于功能请求的任何其他上下文、模型或示例。

## Priority / 优先级

- [ ] Critical / 关键
- [ ] High / 高
- [ ] Medium / 中
- [ ] Low / 低

## Willingness to Contribute / 贡献意愿

- [ ] I would like to implement this feature myself
      我愿意自己实现此功能
- [ ] I can help test this feature
      我可以帮助测试此功能
- [ ] I can help with documentation
      我可以帮助编写文档
